# Moment.js
A JavaScript date library for parsing, validating, manipulating, and formatting dates.
## Project Status
Moment.js is a legacy project, now in maintenance mode.
In most cases, you should choose a different library.
...
Moment.js is freely distributable under the terms of the MIT license.
## About
Parse, validate, manipulate, and display dates in javascript.
momentjs.com

This is a command line tool to help build, run, and test
WebExtensions.
Ultimately, it aims to support browser extensions in a standard, portable,
cross-platform way.
Initially, it will provide a streamlined experience for developing
Firefox Extensions.

# Mido - MIDI Objects for Python
Mido is a library for working with MIDI messages and ports:
```
>>> import mido
...
Full documentation at https://mido.readthedocs.io/
...
Mido requires Python 3.7 or higher.
## Installing
```
python3 -m pip install mido
...
## Source Code
https://github.com/mido/mido/
## License
Mido is released under the terms of the MIT license.
